channel.title: Projects on Tachadol Robotics Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Tachadol Robotics Portfolio

item.title: Compliant Tactile Fingertip with Underactuated Cam-Driven Active Pinching
item.description: A smart fingertip retrofit that uses underactuated cam-driven flexure to improve grasping of slippery and soft objects.

item.title: Tanuki: Scalable End-effector Platform for Fine Manipulation with the Ability to Use Tools
item.description: A modular and scalable end-effector platform that combines robustness with high-speed, high-precision fine manipulation.

item.title: Morphological Adaptation for Speed Control of Pipeline Inspection Gauges
item.description: An add-on adaptive speed control module for pipeline inspection gauges, using morphological adaptation via a rotary valve unit and closed-loop PD control — demonstrated in a real industrial pipeline.

item.title: Jamming-Based Stiffness-Adjustable Wheel on Soft Terrain
item.description: Master’s research on a stiffness-adjustable wheel using jamming mechanisms for improved soft-terrain mobility.

item.title: MPPT Solar Cell System for LED Streetlight
item.description: Freelance development of an MPPT-based solar power system for LED streetlights, including power electronics, prototype-to-PCB transition, and weatherproof deployment considerations.

item.title: Mobile Robot Prototype for Explosive Area
item.description: Designed and developed prototype mobile robot bases for operation in harsh and explosive environments.

item.title: Shield for Heroes: Staff and Contact-Point 3D-Printed Fabrication
item.description: Volunteer fabrication effort for 3D-printed face shields, supporting medical staff and rural hospitals across Thailand during the COVID-19 period.

item.title: 3D MEMS Micropositioning via Femtoprint for Out-of-Plane Motion
item.description: Bachelor’s thesis and FEMTO-ST internship work investigating femtosecond-laser-based Femtoprint fabrication for MEMS structures with out-of-plane motion beyond conventional planar microfabrication limits.

item.title: 4-DOF Palletizer Robot
item.description: Team project to develop a 4-DOF palletizer robot for automatic parcel sorting and rack storage.
